flows.name: Australian Energy Statistics Table O: electricity generation by fuel type
flows.description: DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics workbook for electricity generation by fuel type. Includes historical annual series with Australia, state, financial year, calendar year, and industry/state breakdown sheets.
